title: Check AGB HV Charge Percentage In The Power Section
summary: Determine the current HV charge percentage for a selected AGB by selecting the AGB in the interface and reading the value shown in the small power section.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when troubleshooting or checking battery state for an AGB and you need to see the HV charge percentage displayed in the interface.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer battery condition beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.
Do not use this procedure as a battery recovery, charging, or handling procedure.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Select the AGB in the interface, locate the power section, read the HV charge percentage, and record the observed value.

safety_notes: This source supports viewing and recording the displayed HV charge percentage only.
Do not infer battery condition beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the AGB selection interface
Visibility of the power section for the selected AGB

access_required: Access to the interface where an AGB can be selected
system_preconditions: The target AGB is available to be selected in the interface
The selected AGB details area displays a power section

visual_references.description: Training video frame associated with the discussion that selecting an AGB shows a small power section with HV charge percentage.

steps.title: Select the AGB in the interface
steps.purpose: Open the selected AGB details so the power section can be viewed.
steps.instruction: Select the AGB in the interface.
steps.expected_result: The AGB is selected and its details area is available for inspection.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGB can be selected in the interface.

actions.label: Select AGB
actions.exact_action: Select the AGB in the interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the selected AGB details area referenced in the training discussion.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the AGB cannot be selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If you select the AGB, there's a small section over here that says power; it will tell you the charge percentage of the HV.

steps.title: Locate the power section
steps.purpose: Find the interface area that displays the HV charge percentage for the selected AGB.
steps.instruction: Locate the small section labeled power for the selected AGB.
steps.expected_result: The power section is visible for the selected AGB.
steps.healthy_condition: A small section labeled power is visible in the selected AGB details area.
steps.failure_condition: The power section is not visible or does not appear for the selected AGB.

actions.label: Find power section
actions.exact_action: Locate the small section labeled power for the selected AGB.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the selected AGB details area and the small section that says power.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the power section does not display for the selected AGB.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If you select the AGB, there's a small section over here that says power...

steps.title: Read the HV charge percentage
steps.purpose: Determine the currently displayed HV charge percentage for the selected AGB.
steps.instruction: Read the displayed HV charge percentage from the power section.
steps.expected_result: A numeric HV charge percentage is visible in the power section.
steps.healthy_condition: The power section shows an HV charge percentage value.
steps.failure_condition: No HV charge percentage is displayed in the power section.

actions.label: Read HV percentage
actions.exact_action: Read the displayed HV charge percentage from the power section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look at the power section for the HV charge percentage value; the training gives 50% as an example.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the power section does not display an HV charge percentage.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: It will tell you the charge percentage of the HV. So it's at 50%.

steps.title: Record the observed percentage
steps.purpose: Capture the displayed HV charge percentage for troubleshooting or issue work.
steps.instruction: Record the observed percentage value, such as the example value of 50% mentioned in the training discussion.
steps.expected_result: The displayed HV charge percentage is documented.
steps.healthy_condition: The observed percentage is recorded exactly as displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The value is not recorded or is interpreted beyond what is displayed.

actions.label: Document displayed value
actions.exact_action: Record the observed percentage value, such as the example value of 50% mentioned in the training discussion.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and avoid further interpretation if the displayed value cannot be read clearly.
Do not infer battery condition beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.

success_criteria: The AGB is selected in the interface.
The power section for the selected AGB is located.
The HV charge percentage is visible and read.
healthy_conditions: The selected AGB displays a small power section.
The power section shows an HV charge percentage value.
failure_conditions: The power section is not visible for the selected AGB.
The power section does not display an HV charge percentage.
The observed value cannot be recorded exactly as displayed.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the AGB cannot be selected.
Escalate if the power section does not display an HV charge percentage.
Do not infer battery condition beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selected AGB details area and the small power section referenced in the training discussion.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: If you select the AGB, there's a small section over here that says power; it will tell you the charge percentage of the HV. So it's at 50%.

missing_details: The source does not identify the exact interface name or navigation path used to select the AGB.
The source does not provide a screenshot clearly dedicated to the power section; the attached artifact is only nearby visual support.
The source does not define any numeric thresholds or interpretation rules for the displayed percentage within this procedure.
The source does not specify where or how the observed percentage should be recorded.
